2026-04-21T15:54:13.7631826Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-21T15:54:13.7632760Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-21T15:54:13.7633544Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-21T15:54:13.7634154Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
